_description: Expected JSON format for a closed-won deal record entering the handoff pipeline via POST /activate. This is what AskElephant sends when a deal closes.
_note: Outcome data (churned/retained/expanded) exists only in historical training data, NOT in live webhook payloads.

company.name: string — company name
company.industry: string — one of: SaaS/Tech, Marketing Agency, Fintech, PropTech, Healthcare IT, EdTech, eCommerce, Managed IT/Cybersecurity, Professional Services, Vertical SaaS
company.annual_revenue: int — estimated annual revenue in USD

deal.amount: float — annual contract value in USD
deal.seats: int — number of user seats purchased
deal.price_per_seat_monthly: float — monthly price per seat in USD
deal.kickoff_date: string | null — YYYY-MM-DD, may be TBD at handoff time
deal.use_case: string — primary use case: CRM automation, Call recording + coaching, Sales-to-CS handoff, Pipeline visibility, Forecasting accuracy, Rep productivity, Onboarding automation
deal.competitor: string — Gong | Fathom | Fireflies | Clari | Chorus | None
deal.inbound_channel: string | null — demo_request | content_download | referral | webinar_signup | website_chat (null if outbound)

people.name: string — full name
people.role: string — champion | exec_sponsor | technical_evaluator | end_user | procurement
people.title: string — job title

touches.touch_number: int — sequential touch number across entire deal lifecycle
touches.type: string — cold_call | cold_email | linkedin_message | qualification_call | discovery_call | follow_up_call | follow_up_email | demo | technical_eval | proposal_call | exec_meeting | pricing_call | negotiation_call
touches.duration_minutes: int — 0 for emails/messages, actual duration for calls
touches.person_name: string — who was on this touch
touches.person_role: string — their role in the deal
touches.stage: string — prospecting | qualification | discovery | demo_evaluation | proposal | negotiation
touches.response_time_hours: float | null — hours until prospect responded (emails/LinkedIn only)
touches.rescheduled: bool — whether this meeting was rescheduled
touches.reschedule_reason: string | null — why it was rescheduled
touches.ai_summary: string — AskElephant AI-generated summary of the touch
objections: string — objection raised during this touch
touches.sentiment: string — positive | neutral | cautious | negative | no_contact

touches.ai_summary: No response. Cold Email to Sarah Chen at BrightStack.

Sarah confirmed her 12-person sales team spends roughly 40% of time on manual CRM entry in HubSpot. They trialed Gong last year but dropped it due to cost. Primary pain is pipeline visibility — leadership can't trust the forecast because data entry is inconsistent.

questions_asked.question: How are your reps currently logging call notes?
questions_asked.answer: Inconsistently. Maybe 4 out of 12 do it after every call.

questions_asked.question: What made you move away from Gong?
questions_asked.answer: Price. $150/seat was too much for our team size.

questions_asked.question: Does this integrate directly with HubSpot?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, native two-way sync. Fields update automatically after each call.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take?
questions_asked.answer: Most teams are live within a week. No engineering resources needed.

objections: Concerned about adoption — previous tool rollouts have had low uptake
next_steps: Schedule demo for Sarah + IT Director Emily Garcia
Send case study from similar-sized SaaS company
